claim: Agent skills are markdown files that define reusable, specialized prompts and instructions for Claude Code, avoiding repetitive context copy-pasting across projects
actionable: Create skills in ~/.claude/skills/[skill_name]/SKILL.md with name, description, and detailed instructions; reference them in new projects to apply consistent patterns and domain knowledge
source_title: How to Create Claude Code Agent Skills in 2026

claim: Agent skills can include references, examples, and executable scripts, enabling complex automation like email composition, code documentation, and workflow automation
actionable: Structure skills with SKILL.md (instructions), references.md (technical details), examples.md (usage samples), and executable scripts for actions like sending emails or updating databases
source_title: How to Create Claude Code Agent Skills in 2026

claim: The Anthropic skills repository on GitHub contains production-ready skill examples for documents, PDFs, PowerPoint, and code generation that can be adapted for custom use cases
actionable: Browse github.com/anthropics/skills for examples; copy relevant skills to your ~/.claude/skills folder and customize them for your specific domain and workflow
source_title: How to Create Claude Code Agent Skills in 2026

claim: Skills can be scoped to personal use, shared via enterprise settings, or bundled in plugins, with personal and project-scoped skills stored locally in ~/.claude and project folders
actionable: Organize skills by scope: ~/.claude/skills for personal reuse, project-root/skills for team-wide patterns, and plugin-based distribution for broader sharing
source_title: How to Create Claude Code Agent Skills in 2026

claim: Comprehensive skill descriptions enable Claude Code to intelligently determine when to invoke skills and reduces token usage by excluding irrelevant skills from context
actionable: Write detailed skill descriptions that clearly explain the domain and use case; Claude will only consider skills relevant to the current task, optimizing token usage
source_title: How to Create Claude Code Agent Skills in 2026
